authority.rule: This registry is the provider-neutral reference surface for external harness adapters. Adapters may add discovery metadata, but workflow logic stays in the referenced .claude files.

exclusions.note: Durable .claude files intentionally NOT listed in `surfaces`, matched by glob on name. The agentic-surface guard (scripts/check-agentic-surface.mjs) skips these. `copilot` lists surfaces that need no GitHub Copilot adapter (suppresses the parity warning).

surfaces.name: run-brainstorm
surfaces.purpose: Drive a full visual brainstorm session

surfaces.name: plan-closeout
surfaces.purpose: Close the active plan and feed learnings back into the repo

surfaces.name: discover-skills
surfaces.purpose: Find local skills or ingest new craft

surfaces.name: diagnose-studio
surfaces.purpose: Diagnose the studio, bridge, or MCP from evidence

surfaces.name: artifact-chat
surfaces.purpose: Route artifact questions and revisions through subagents

surfaces.name: replace-artifact
surfaces.purpose: Regenerate a killed artifact's slot: svg-artisan replacement guided by characteristic + kill note, captured with replaces lineage

surfaces.name: read-mindmap
surfaces.purpose: Read a mind map off disk (tree.md/edited-tree.json/tree-ops.jsonl) and turn it into user intention that anchors the next tree, artifact-chat answers, and the build plan

surfaces.name: reopen
surfaces.purpose: Move a completed thread back to live discussion and resume it

surfaces.name: build-check
surfaces.purpose: Run the canonical build and test verification

surfaces.name: new-command
surfaces.purpose: Codify recurring work as a new repeatable command

surfaces.name: create-dispatch-command
surfaces.purpose: Turn a plan into a loopable dispatcher command

surfaces.name: compress-learnings
surfaces.purpose: Weekly: compact the agentic learnings log (recent verbatim, older distilled, originals archived)

surfaces.name: wiki-maintenance
surfaces.purpose: Cross-plan wiki lint/reconcile sweep; delegates to wiki-librarian and reloads the visual-brainstorm-wiki MCP index

surfaces.name: add-theme
surfaces.purpose: Add or ingest a studio theme

surfaces.name: revisit-round
surfaces.purpose: Handle the user returning to a previous round and re-answering it

surfaces.name: read-scribble
surfaces.purpose: Read an annotated-photo scribble seed off disk and anchor the brainstorm on the user's marks

surfaces.name: brainstorm-phases
surfaces.purpose: Drive the five-phase funnel and interpret every response field

surfaces.name: svg-authoring
surfaces.purpose: Author divergent SVG board options and validate them

surfaces.name: caveman
surfaces.purpose: Ultra-compressed reply register for machine-read seams (subagent report-backs, mechanical reports, brief prose) — never the human-facing voice or SVG content

surfaces.name: reading-scribbles
surfaces.purpose: Interpret an annotated-photo scribble (arrows/boxes/highlights/notes) as user intent

surfaces.name: brainstorm-orchestrator
surfaces.purpose: Primary brainstorm persona and orchestration owner

surfaces.name: devops-diagnostician
surfaces.purpose: Evidence-first diagnosis for studio, bridge, and MCP

surfaces.name: svg-artisan
surfaces.purpose: Delegated SVG generation and revision

surfaces.name: test-engineer
surfaces.purpose: Testing and verification specialist

surfaces.name: wiki-librarian
surfaces.purpose: Authoritative documentation and changelog discipline
